23:09 ГўВҖВ” May 23, 2023
Update to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated
the
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, to inc
lude the digital banking Log File fee. This is not a new fee and there is no fee increase. The fee just wasnГўВҖВҷt previously published in the fee schedule.
The Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only.
